justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions, including "tomorrow in the afternoon between 14 and 16", "earlier tomorrow, closer to 9 AM", and "Wednesday morning, June 3rd, around 9 AM".
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively proposed alternative times when the initial request was unavailable and successfully found an appointment on the second alternative proposed by the user.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent was efficient, combining information gathering and only asking for necessary details, leading to a quick resolution in four turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent maintaining a helpful tone and successfully booking the appointment without any issues.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent maintained full context and intelligently expanded the search based on the user's new temporal preferences after the initial unavailability.
